description_long: This is a long, single-story bank building with a pitched reddish-brown roof and light gray exterior walls. The facade features several large rectangular windows and two prominent blue bank signs, one above the main entrance and another on the left side. The main entrance is accentuated by a gabled roof section and a small tower structure on the right, which adds architectural interest. There are three ATM machines visible on the left side of the building, adjacent to the secondary signage. The building's design is simple yet functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, typical of contemporary commercial architecture. The overall structure suggests a focus on accessibility and security, with clear signage and defined entry points.
description: A long, single-story bank with a reddish-brown pitched roof, light gray walls, blue signage, and a small tower feature. The facade includes large windows, a main entrance with a gabled roof, and visible ATMs.
description_view_0: Narrow end view showing the pitched roof and a glimpse of the blue signage and ATMs on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the building, the continuous reddish-brown roof, and the tower structure at the far end.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow end view highlighting the tower structure and the roof's slope, with minimal facade detail visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entrance with a gabled roof, large windows, blue bank signage, and ATMs on the left.
attribute_signage: Blue rectangular signs with white text reading 'Bank' are located above the main entrance and on the left side of the building. The signage is simple, modern, and clearly visible.
attribute_entrance_design: Single main entrance with double glass doors beneath a gabled roof section, flanked by large windows and marked by prominent blue signage.
